title: Interpret diagnostic test results
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Interpret diagnostic test results demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Compile diagnostic tool knowledge requirements

pcs.text: Compile a portfolio of sample reports of diagnostic test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile a portfolio of sample reports of diagnostic test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile a portfolio of sample reports of diagnostic test results.
